economic_notes: TTI (Twatatya Takenhas Inc.) is a 100% owned GBE investing in on-reserve and off-reserve business ventures. TTI holds 9.1% interest in MySmartSimulations Inc. and 100% of Onyota'a:Ka Kahsatst^'Sla' Ltd. which will own and operate a community solar microgrid. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership distributions restricted to community development, health, education, cultural and economic development. First Nation holds 1.8217% interest in Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth LP.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. Long Term Care Home (TSI'Nu:Yoyantle'Na'Tuhuwatisni) is fully consolidated. Twatatya Takenhas Inc. (TTI) accounted for using modified equity method as GBE. Current liabilities include accounts payable $5,517,774 and deposits $23,990. Revenue lines include deferred revenue movements netting $43,024,506 total. Government transfers per Note 20 show recognized amounts after deferral adjustments. OSR calculated as total revenue $43,024,506 minus total government transfers recognized $36,503,227 = $6,521,279. Emergency services expenses $4,410,525 and Long Term Care $5,435,398 not mapped to standard categories above.
